title: Crispy Jamaican Peel Fold
description: A savory and crispy dish featuring candied peel, high in protein for a cozy and comforting meal.
instructions: Mix together the candied orange peel, garlic powder, all-purpose flour, peanut butter, coconut flakes, and almond meal until well combined.
Divide mixture into small portions, about 1 inch in diameter each.
Form each portion into a cone shape using your hands. Press gently to create a slight indent at the bottom for easy flipping.
Lightly dust the tops of the cones with more all-purpose flour or almond meal to prevent sticking and help achieve a crispy exterior during frying.
Heat about 2 inches (5 cm) of vegetable oil in a deep fryer or large pot until it reaches 375°F (190°C).
Gently place each cone into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan. Fry for about 2-4 minutes on one side until golden brown and puffed up.
Using a slotted spoon, carefully transfer each folded peel fold to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil. Repeat frying process with remaining portions if necessary.
Serve warm or at room temperature as a snack or appetizer. Enjoy the rich flavors of Jamaica in every bite.
